programme.title: Sesame Street: Making the Band

programme.title: Donkey Hodie: Squibbit/ Teamwork Challenge

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rapists Anonymous
programme.desc: Rollins tries to help her friend press charges against her lover when she accuses him of rape, but her friend's history with the suspect makes the he-said, she-said case too difficult to prosecute.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Murdered at a Bad Address

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: She Paints for Vengeance

programme.desc: Callen and Sam are assigned protection duty for Deputy Crown Prince Kamal after an unknown assassin targets his decoy upon his arrival in Los Angeles.

programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy

programme.title: Frasier: Beloved Infidel

programme.title: Frasier: Selling Out
programme.desc: Frasier learns how much he could earn from personal endorsements and he starts doing ads.

programme.title: Frasier: Oops

programme.title: Reba: Who Killed Brock

programme.title: Reba: The Pageant of Grandmas
programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean compete against each other in a beauty pageant for grandmothers.

programme.title: Reba: Reba's Rules of Real Estate
programme.desc: Reba hears that the city's hottest real estate agent wants to interview her for a job.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.title: Movie: Hats Off to Christmas!
programme.desc: The assistant manager of the Santa Hat Factory must train the boss’s son for the job she was passed up for, but ends up falling for him.

programme.title: Movie: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Pemberley Manor
programme.desc: A rookie party planner works with a serious and all-business to put together a Christmas festival with help from a merrily enigmatic caretaker who looks like Santa. As the festival approaches, the spirit of the holidays may lead to a wish of love.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow

programme.title: South Park: The Last of the Meheecans

programme.title: South Park: Asspen

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical

programme.desc: Harper Avery arrives at Grey Sloan, putting Bailey on edge. A familiar face from Meredith's past returns as a patient, and Amelia tries to manage a secret.

programme.desc: Brenda's team investigates the shooting death of a popular online 'hook-up king.'

programme.title: The Closer: Strike Three

programme.title: The Closer: Elysian Fields
programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a man who, 10 years ago, was the lead suspect in the murder of two girls. The state of the body indicates he was dragged behind a truck a full day before being shot twice in the head and dumped in Elysian Park.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Shame Game
programme.desc: Major Crimes struggles to keep important documents from leaking. A situation proves extremely uncomfortable for Capt. Raydor, when the Department of Children and Family Services tracks down Rusty's biological father.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dismissed With Prejudice
programme.desc: When a murder conviction is overturned after eight years, Tao is forced to question his past actions. Meanwhile, Rusty struggles to be himself during his first outing with his father.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cheaters Never Prosper
programme.desc: A man from Las Vegas is found dead after an apparent overdose but the facts become unclear as details begin to unfold. Meanwhile, a series of strange events leave Rusty and Raydor wondering if Dunn can be trusted.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the words 'F E D' on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers, leading to a surprising conclusion that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of teacher’s aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community. As rumors spread about suspects, the actual perp slipped further away. Investigators and a scientific breakthrough lead to a shocking end of the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Soul(mate) Searching
programme.desc: While on a spiritual quest to find balance in Bali, Kourtney gets some news that makes her consider a future with Scott. Kim and Khloe are determined to have an insightful psychic reading but get more than they bargained for.

programme.desc: Kim decides to follow in her father's footsteps and pursue her lifelong dream of becoming a lawyer, but worries she may have taken on more than she can handle.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pet Peeve
programme.desc: Khloe’s mistrust of her mother’s boyfriend, Corey, resurfaces on a very awkward family trip to Palm Springs, leaving Kris hurt and confused about her daughter’s behavior. Meanwhile, the family stays with Kendall to escape the fires.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Determined to fulfil one of North's lifelong dreams, Kim puts her survival skills to the test on an overnight camping trip in the wilderness. Malika heads back to Cleveland for the first time since True's birth and suspects Khloe is struggling internally.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Jason and Ashley Wahler visit to do their first TV interview since having their new baby.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Training Faye
programme.desc: Julie gets frustrated when the family use Chloe's birthday as a reason to compete against each other. Nanny Faye gets more than she bargained for when Todd insists on being her trainer.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: White Nannies Can't Jump
programme.desc: Todd and Julie's podcasting career almost ends before it starts when Todd goes overboard with preparation. Meanwhile, Nanny Faye joins a senior basketball league.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Restaurant Impossible
programme.desc: Chase decides to start his own candle business and Julie finds that her dream of opening up her own restaurant clashes with Todd's vision.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Spoiled Sports
programme.desc: Todd gets roped into a boys trip to Universal Orlando for Grayson's birthday, and Julie teaches Chloe a lesson in sportsmanship before her first horse riding competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Perfect Equation
programme.desc: When Savannah brings home her new boyfriend Todd takes the opportunity to test his intentions. Chase and Savannah step up and help when Grayson struggles with a math test.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord of the Earrings
programme.desc: Todd tries to teach Julie a lesson about keeping track of her jewelry after she loses another expensive piece. Nanny Faye enlists Chase's help for a neighborhood porch competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Diplomatic Immunity
programme.desc: Due to a work commitment, Julie must miss Chloe's Pre-K graduation while Todd takes over her duties. Savannah tries to prove to Todd she's ready for a new job in California.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Towing the Line
programme.desc: Chase takes advantage of his dad's car when Savannah signs them up to babysit over Father's Day. Meanwhile, Grayson has trouble getting along with Savannah's boyfriend, Nic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Pool's Out for Summer
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to get Chase to move to Nashville, Todd offers him their house that he's already promised to Savannah. Meanwhile the ladies can't get enough of Alison's new hot pool instructor.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Big 50
programme.desc: Todd ponders the first half of his life as his 50th birthday approaches. Meanwhile, Grayson clamors to be left home alone now that he's 12 years old.

programme.title: Extreme Paranormal Witness: Taken by Aliens

programme.title: Extreme Paranormal Witness: Phantom Blood
programme.desc: A young mother rents a California bungalow for her growing family. All's well, until she starts hearing strange noises coming from overhead. Soon, she's plagued by unseen hands moving objects, glowing lights, phantom blood and an apparition of an old man.

programme.title: Extreme Paranormal Witness: Stage Fright

programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a Rolls-Royce once owned by Johnny Cash. Then, a coin from the Byzantine Empire lands in the shop. Also, Chumlee fills in at a friend's hot dog stand.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick the Giant
programme.desc: The shop checks out some posters by artist Shepard Fairey, the artist behind the famous Obama posters. Corey and Chumlee look at the possibility of getting a Mork figurine. Later, Rick and Chum evaluate their friendship.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: No Pawn for You!

programme.title: Pawn Stars: First Lady of Pawn
programme.desc: Get body slammed with the Pawn Stars when a WWE Hall of Fame ring fights for the title. Corey gets scrappy when he checks out a 1927 Essex Sedan rat rod. Martha Washington brings home the bacon when an 1891 $1 silver certificate circulates into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dollars and Dunks
programme.desc: Rick checks out one of Kobe Bryant's warm-up jerseys that's been signed by the man himself. An antique weapon sale finds Rick debating the item's price. Corey makes an impulsive buy of a favourite novel.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rebel Without a Pawn
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee rock out with Angus Young of AC/DC's personal memorabilia. Then, an ID bracelet that belonged to Hollywood legend James Dean finds its way into the store, and Rick heads east to check out a rare WWII relic.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Happy Meal, Happy Day

programme.title: Jessie: The Jessie-nator: Grudgement Day
programme.desc: Future Jessie appears from an elevator time machine to warn present Jessie to run for her life. She tells Jessie that when Ravi grows up, he invents a robot version of Bertram which tries to destroy Jessie and take over the world.

programme.title: Jessie: Somebunny's in Trouble
programme.desc: When Zuri loses interest in bunnysitting her class pet, Jessie steps in, only to lose the rabbit. Meanwhile, Emma has a crush on a school jock and enlists Luke’s help to learn more about sports.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Ridgewood-A-Rooney
programme.desc: When Parker gets bumped up a few grades, he starts attending high school with Liv, Maddie and Joey! The older siblings now have to deal with him being good at everything.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Coach-A-Rooney
programme.desc: A new coach arrives to take charge of the girls' basketball team and immediately butts heads with Maddie. Meanwhile, when Liv agrees to help Parker with his art project, her date with Holden takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Mattress Stores and Music Factories
programme.desc: Austin in unable to find a new passion and feels forced to take a job at his parents' mattress store. Ally struggles to keep up with an arrival of music students. Dez and Trish try and help Austin and Ally with their problems.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Grand Openings and Great Expectations
programme.desc: The gang is in over their heads when they have less than a week to teach total novices how to play in a band in time for the A&A Music Factory's grand opening.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.title: Jessie: The Talented Mr. Kipling
programme.desc: Despite being weary of Ravi's seven-foot Asian water monitor lizard, Jessie comes to the lizard's rescue after the head of the condo board attempts to ban him from the building. Meanwhile, Zuri brings home another imaginary friend.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Puppeteer 2
programme.desc: Manon becomes The Puppeteer again. And she is determined to have fun like never before in a unique playground: the wax museum.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Cat Blanc

programme.title: Sofia the First: Sofia in Elvenmoor

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Secret Library

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's Birthday Balloon Bash / Hide-and-Go-Sleep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo help Uncle Stripe and Bandit play squash, spend the day with Nana, and Bingo has to learn to play alone!

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Bakerix

programme.desc: An old friend of Master Fu's, Marianne, gets akumatized into Backwarder. Armed with a magic wand, she wants to make up for lost time by stealing it from others! There's not a second to lose for Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Reflekdoll

programme.title: License to Kill: Deadly God Complex

programme.desc: An alarming spike in ICU patient deaths prompts a head nurse to investigate the cause. After examining charts recorded by the hospital staff, her findings send shockwaves through the small Indiana town.

programme.title: License to Kill: Deadly Dialysis
programme.desc: Dialysis patients' weekly treatments go from routine to fatal without explanation. Police shut down the Lufkin, TX, facility to investigate what, or who, may have turned lethal.

programme.title: License to Kill: Killing Everything

programme.desc: A deadly design flaw results in a horrifying rush hour bridge collapse that tragically leaves 13 dead in Minneapolis. Using the latest science, experts investigate to reveal what went so catastrophically wrong on one of Minnesota's busiest crossings.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Texas
programme.desc: A series of violent explosions rip through a major Texas oil refinery, causing a fatal disaster and devastation on a terrifying scale. Experts use the latest science to investigate and uncover what triggered a catastrophic malfunction.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Calamity Comes to Canada
programme.desc: A Canadian shopping mall's parking garage suddenly collapses, resulting in a fatal disaster. Engineers investigate and discover a deadly design flaw that could have been prevented.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Firefighting Sky Giant
programme.desc: The Global Supertanker is the largest firefighting aircraft in the world. Learn how it is a vital tool for supporting firefighters on the ground.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Abandoned Resurrection
programme.desc: The abandoned Battersea Power Station on the banks of the River Thames is being reinvented into a stunning centerpiece of London. Now, experts use cutting-edge construction techniques to transform this historic landmark into a pioneering new destination.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Leaning Towers of Terror
programme.desc: A city with hundreds of leaning buildings, the world's scariest airport, and the world's biggest sewage pipe are home to engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Holes from Hell

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Mystery on Easter Island
programme.desc: Archaeologists have struggled for centuries to understand the ancient moai statues of Easter Island and the purpose behind their mysterious placement; now, experts use cutting-edge tech to finally reveal the hidden logic behind their cryptic locations.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: War of the Ancients
programme.desc: A gruesome archaeological discovery leads to a shocking excavation that uncovers ancient human carnage on a scale that's unparalleled; experts use 3-D bone modeling to reveal evidence of what may be the first catastrophic, major war in human history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Legend of the Cursed Temple
programme.desc: A temple to the Roman god of the underworld was the site of ritual sacrifice and a gate to the underworld, but it was buried because it was believed to be cursed. Experts use cutting-edge forensics to reveal what actually happened here.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Maze of Cryptic Terror
programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning; using advanced photogrammetry, experts finally decode these cryptic scrawls to expose a dark chapter of English history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Gladiator Graveyard
programme.desc: When a mass grave of mutilated skeletons is unearthed at the frontier of the Roman Empire, experts use advanced digital analysis to reveal the mystery behind these grisly remains.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Grave of the Red Skulls
programme.desc: When experts discover a 500-year-old grave, they find mysterious red skulls, pointing to a shocking mass sacrifice; experts use the latest technology and state-of-the-art forensics to investigate what happened at this horrific site.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Riddle of the Child Mummies
programme.desc: Archaeologists make a shocking discovery when the perfectly preserved remains of three children are unearthed from the frozen mountains of Argentina; using state-of-the-art forensics, experts investigate the bizarre circumstances behind this grisly scene.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Tomb of the Red Queen
programme.desc: In an abandoned Maya city, an archaeologist discovers the tomb of a mysterious red skeleton decorated in jade and pearl treasures; experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal who this person was and why they were buried so.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A teenage party at the edge of the city turns horrific after the discovery of a woman's corpse. Detectives easily surmise that she was strangled with her own shoelace, but figuring out her identity proves difficult.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation. But when Kenda takes a closer look at the victim's love life, he realizes someone's been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. Six months later however, Kenda receives an unprompted confession that propels the case in a whole new direction.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda: Fourteen Stories Down
programme.desc: When a promising young realtor plunges to his death from the 14th story of a trendy Miami high-rise, first responders assume suicide. But Det. Joe Shellac suspects foul play and follows a series of clues to the bloodied body of a second victim.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Mother-To-Be
programme.desc: In Burlington, North Carolina, 2003, pregnant April Greer vanishes. Her boyfriend says she left him, and her family is worried sick. No one knows that the unbearable truth about what really happened to April is the stuff of nightmares.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Winter's Bone

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed Thanksgiving?
programme.desc: When a mother of four is found tortured and brutally murdered in her home, the people of Northport, Washington discover that their isolation doesn't guarantee their safety.

programme.title: Disappeared: Against the Tide

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: American Nightmare: The Answering Machine
programme.desc: When a charitable, up-and-coming actress is savagely murdered in her home, police believe an angry, revenge-hungry killer is responsible. No one could expect the lies, obsessions, and evidence that will be uncovered in this shocking cold case.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang

programme.desc: In a nation forged by guts and glory, it takes true cojones to stand out from the crowd. Legendary figures Benjamin Franklin, Al Capone, Abraham Lincoln and Ernest Hemingway have earned their seat at the tough guy table for their no nonsense attitudes.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Living on the Edge

programme.title: Las Vegas: Capital of Deception

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Killing Spree
programme.desc: A string of murders targeting a pizza chain and its employees leads to a nationwide manhunt for a killer hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of teacher’s aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community. As rumors spread about suspects, the actual perp slipped further away. Investigators and a scientific breakthrough lead to a shocking end of the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the words 'F E D' on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers, leading to a surprising conclusion that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the words 'F E D' on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers, leading to a surprising conclusion that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of teacher’s aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community. As rumors spread about suspects, the actual perp slipped further away. Investigators and a scientific breakthrough lead to a shocking end of the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Jaws Awakens: Phred vs. Slash: Sharkmania

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper Pops Shark Week

programme.title: Sharkadelic Summer 2
programme.desc: Sharkadelic is back to find out if this summer will be the sharkiest on record. Snoop Dogg breaks down the craziest encounters, the wildest and most unpredictable reactions to discover if America is once again ground zero for the shark superstorm.

programme.title: Mega Jaws of Bird Island
programme.desc: South African great whites are on the brink of extinction, but experts believe there is at least one breeder shark left in the water surrounding Bird Island. A team will search and tag the last female great white mature enough to carry on the species.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Raising the Bar
programme.desc: The rambunctious team of Alison Sweeney and Sunny Anderson light up the arena with their sights set on Bobby. Young gun Kelvin Fernandez sharpens his knives to take on Japanese superstar Chris Kobayashi for a shot at taking down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Riding the Wave
programme.desc: Honolulu's Shaymus Alwin faces off with Boston restaurateur Jeremy Sewall for the chance to take Bobby Flay's crown. With 'The Kitchen's' Katie Lee and resident 'Cutthroat Kitchen' judge Simon Majumdar, these chefs have all the support they need.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby Gets Sacked
programme.desc: Boston burger king Paul Malvone faces off against Twin City chef Jack Riebel on the gridiron. Former professional football player Eddie Jackson and sportscaster Jaymee Sire decide which chef gets the chance to sack Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: They Took The Cheese
programme.desc: It's a battle of the Southern chefs as Houston's Roshni Gurnani faces off against New Orleans' Carl Schaubhut. Coaching them to victory against Bobby Flay are "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell and "Chopped's" Marcus Samuelsson.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Proper Smackdown
programme.desc: English chef Ian Winslade and Southern chef Geoff Rhyne must get through the challenges of the star ingredient before they can have a proper smackdown against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pretty Little Fryer
programme.desc: "Best Baker in America's" Scott Conant teams up with actress Sasha Pieterse to get the truth and a loss out of Bobby Flay. They get a little help from talented farm-to-table chef Anthony Lo Pinto and seafood maven Franco Robazetti.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: 25 Ingredients or Less
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis brings in pal Meredith Vieira to try to beat Bobby Flay in 25 ingredients or less. Chefs Marcos Campos and Nicholas Poulmetis try not to slip up on the star ingredient for a shot at taking down the king.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Soul Food in the Dark
programme.desc: At Soul Food in the Park in York, PA, owner Audra makes up for her lack of knowledge and confidence by yelling at her husband. Robert Irvine and his team race to completely renovate her rundown building and help Audra overcome her anger issues.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Competition 'Cue
programme.desc: Inspired by the BBQ competition circuit, it's all about low and slow as captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson see how well their contenders handle the classic BBQ cuts that have turned weekend warriors into household names.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sugar And Spice, But Not So Nice
programme.desc: Losing is never sweet. Pastry chefs Josh Johnson and Dana Cree both want the sweet rush of victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Hold On For One More Flay
programme.desc: Bobby is not safe when Carnie Wilson joins up with her teammate from "The Kitchen", Katie Lee. They bring in from Philly, Jeremy Nolen as he battles against Indian grill master, Vijay Sadhu for a chance to go up against Iron Chef, Bobby Flay.

programme.desc: Cas and Wendell help a couple whose home has become a giant playroom for their kids and another family drowning in clothes and books. They help both ditch the clutter with space-saving hacks to keep them organized from now on.

programme.title: Hot Mess House: Cluttered to Crafty
programme.desc: Cas works with a couple to transform their downstairs living area to a family-friendly oasis that converts for any occasion. Plus, she and Wendell build the perfect second chapter for a veteran eager to start her new career.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Modern Revival
programme.desc: A couple bought their quaint Tudor-style home with grand visions to renovate, but a growing family put their plans on hold. With their house bursting at the seams, Tiffany's design aims to create a better flow and find more space for this family of five.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Marriage of Styles
programme.desc: A couple is ready to update their family home, but between a boxed-in kitchen, an extra visible bathroom sink and a block-off entryway, they aren't sure where to start. On top of all that, their differing styles make this Tiffany's toughest challenge yet!

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Time Warp Reno
programme.desc: From a batting cage basement to a main bedroom suite stuck in the '80s, this family's home has problems on literally every level. Tiffany is ready to get this house in line, but a slew of unforeseen hiccups immediately starts to eat away at their budget.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Fifty Shades of Bland
programme.desc: A family of five thought they would grow into their home, but now they're desperate to fix its unsuitable layout. Mom enjoys taking design risks, Dad likes everything gray and Tiffany aims to make use of their extra space with a design everyone will love.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: 1st + Forever Home
programme.desc: Between a backyard with no privacy, a tiny home office and a dated kitchen, two homeowners have their pick of which rooms to renovate in their first and forever home. Given the house's age and condition, Tiffany will have to work to keep them on budget.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Modern Industrial Makeover
programme.desc: A couple's funky tri-level has yet to hit its full potential, and while they are both craving WOW factor, they aren't sure where to start. Tiffany urges these homeowners to go bold, but the final product may push them too far out of their comfort zone.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Double Trouble

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Superheroes
programme.desc: From the beginning of recorded history, humans have told stories of supernatural beings. While the ancients told stories about Zeus, Thor, and Hanuman, today we have superheroes such as Superman, Batman and Spiderman.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Agenda
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut theorists have long proposed that extraterrestrials played a pivotal role in our past, and some believe they continue to keep a careful watch over the progress of mankind.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Destination Mars
programme.desc: Within 20 years, the first human colonizers are expected to reach Mars. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest that our voyage to Mars could unlock mysteries of our ancient extraterrestrial origins and possibly be the key to long term human survival.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Wisdom Keepers
programme.desc: The Aborigines of Australia are the oldest, continuously surviving society on Earth. The stories preserved in their oral tradition are said to date back over 60,000 years. Their legends are now being scientifically verified by using geological records.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Russia's Secret Files
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists suggest that otherworldly visitations predate the establishment of the Russian nation, and point to the ancient settlement at Arkaim as evidence.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Shiva the Destroyer
programme.desc: Of the millions of Hindu gods, none is more important than Shiva, the great destroyer. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest this powerful being was the leader of an extraterrestrial faction that came to Earth wielding advanced technology.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mystery of Rudloe Manor
programme.desc: Wiltshire, England is home to the mysterious Rudloe Manor. What appears to be a traditional English manor home is thought by many to be a hotbed of UFO research since World War II.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Pharaohs' Curse
programme.desc: According to legend, an ancient curse was placed upon the tomb of King Tutankhamun. When the tomb was opened in 1922, a series of terrible events occurred. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest that The Pharaoh’s Curse was put in place to protect the truth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: They Came From the Sky
programme.desc: Ancient cultures from around the world believed that meteorites were not merely rocks that fell from the sky, but sacred stones imbued with the power of the Gods.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: They Came From the Sea
programme.desc: Lurking in our oceans are creatures that defy explanation. Octopuses can edit their own DNA, animals are able to regenerate their entire brains, and jellyfish can literally live forever. Learn is they were delivered to Earth by extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Somebody’s Daughter
programme.desc: Detectives often hit dead ends that can stop them cold but, for one young detective, dead ends were just another place to start. She'd beaten the odds in her own life. Now, she was determined to beat them on the job using her head and her heart.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Michelle Young was married to her college sweetheart and pregnant with their second child when she was murdered. In the search for her killer, detectives uncovered a marriage riddled with secrets but cracking this complicated case took years.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: True Lies
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her bed. Then, there were two rapid fire calls to 911, husband and son both immediately pointing fingers at each. Police knew one of them had to be spinning an incredible tale.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: House Of Secrets
programme.desc: Charlie Tan was an Ivy Leaguer with a bright future but then, Charlie's dad was killed. Police were told one story but the evidence was telling another.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House On Sidney's Cove
programme.desc: Nique Leili was juggling family and a thriving career. Then, she vanished. Police found something unusual: Nique's last months were recorded on security cameras around her home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A couple's romantic boat trip turns tragic when a young wife is lost at sea. The case was cold for years until a model with a checkered past goes undercover to find the truth.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Down By the Lake
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds answer the call of a grieving mother, whose 19-year-old son drowned while camping with friends. While the medical examiner ruled it an accident, some suspect foul play.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Preacher's Mother
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve Spingola investigate the brutal slaying of beloved mother Eloise Payne, who was stabbed 38 times in her Michigan home. A mysterious car spotted in the area may hold the key to identifying her killer.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Pain in Pawhuska
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve Spingola investigate the brutal slaying of an Oklahoma teenager whose night of cruising and partying turned deadly. The team searches for justice 22 years later.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Double Life Discovered
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny investigate one of their oldest cases ever, the brutal 1984 murder of an elderly storeowner known for having a wife with a violent temper. Was his death the robbery gone wrong it appeared to be, or a plot of his wife's design?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Holiday Homicide
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey Abbondandolo investigate the cold-blooded killing of a tow truck business owner. Their investigation uncovers a twisted world of alleged abuse, infidelity, and a possible murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Last Call
programme.desc: Friends in New Orleans hit the town looking for a night of fun. But by sunrise, one of them is found dead in the trunk of a burned-out car. No one escapes suspicion, but it's the victim's own words that eventually help bring down her killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: During a cold Minneapolis winter, a night out with good friends takes a dark turn when one of them disappears. Days later, when human remains are discovered, investigators travel a chilling path to catch a killer before another night ends in murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Mystery of the Murdered Major
programme.desc: He was a military man, a respected Major in the US Army. When he was attacked in the middle of the night, police launched an investigation that would reveal wild secrets that might hold the key to murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House in the Woods
programme.desc: A hockey player finds his wife murdered in their home. His daughter says she saw a robber, but the killer's identity turns out to be far more complicated. Police had their suspects but her family had questions of their own.

programme.title: The Forgotten West Memphis Three: The Victims
programme.desc: Bob explores the flaws of the original investigation - meeting with family members, witnesses, and experts - to lay the groundwork for his new evidence-driven investigation.

programme.title: The Forgotten West Memphis Three: Memories
programme.desc: Bob heads to West Memphis to track down key witnesses to paint a clear picture of the boys' final movements on the day they were killed. He also meets with a DNA expert to discuss new technology that might break the case wide open.

programme.title: The Forgotten West Memphis Three: Theories
programme.desc: Bob examines the sensational theories surrounding the case and meets with FBI special agent Jim Clemente to develop a criminal profile. Simultaneously, Bob seeks permission from the West Memphis Three to obtain evidence for new DNA testing.

programme.title: The Forgotten West Memphis Three: Persons of Interest
programme.desc: After obtaining an exclusive interview with a high-profile individual related to the case, Bob narrows his focus in his hunt for the truth.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: A Deadly Con
programme.desc: A navy veteran is brutally stabbed in his senior living community. As detectives work to find the killer, they discover a persuasive con artist. Could this scammer have graduated from fraud to murder?

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Ultimate Sin
programme.desc: After leaving a support group, a young mother is gunned down by a masked shooter. As investigators try to make sense of the case, they reveal a story of religious manipulation that leads to one person committing the ultimate sin.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: When a town councilwoman is gunned down in her home, the only evidence left behind is a bouquet of plastic roses. As detectives work to find the triggerman, they learn that the person calling the shots is closer to home than they originally thought.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Greatest Icons
programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hitler's Nightmare Palace
programme.desc: The ruins of a dreamlike Polish palace hide an astonishingly dark history that's shrouded in mystery to this day. Experts investigate and uncover an ornate gothic structure that concealed a nightmare of Nazi experimentation.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Russian Mafia Resort
programme.desc: Experts uncover the dark secrets lurking behind a holiday complex built along the Black Sea by the Russian mafia.

programme.title: Strangest Things: King Tut's Glass Scarab
programme.desc: The jeweled-encrusted pectoral of King Tut is a hieroglyphic artifact of stunning craftsmanship and one of the greatest treasures of the pharaohs. Using new research and the latest tech, experts confront the ancient mystery of its flawless glass scarab.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Curse of the Piltdown Man
programme.desc: The archaeological world is fooled for nearly half a century when an ape-like skull that's claimed as solid evidence for Darwin's theory of human evolution is proven fake. Using new research, experts investigate and uncover the identity of the forger.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Russian Mafia Resort
programme.desc: Experts uncover the dark secrets lurking behind a holiday complex built along the Black Sea by the Russian mafia.

programme.title: Strangest Things: King Tut's Glass Scarab
programme.desc: The jeweled-encrusted pectoral of King Tut is a hieroglyphic artifact of stunning craftsmanship and one of the greatest treasures of the pharaohs. Using new research and the latest tech, experts confront the ancient mystery of its flawless glass scarab.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Curse of the Piltdown Man
programme.desc: The archaeological world is fooled for nearly half a century when an ape-like skull that's claimed as solid evidence for Darwin's theory of human evolution is proven fake. Using new research, experts investigate and uncover the identity of the forger.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hitler's Nightmare Palace
programme.desc: The ruins of a dreamlike Polish palace hide an astonishingly dark history that's shrouded in mystery to this day. Experts investigate and uncover an ornate gothic structure that concealed a nightmare of Nazi experimentation.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Beyond the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom
programme.desc: Discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts are investigating a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Mystery of the Teleporting Shipwreck
programme.desc: When a credible witness claims to have discovered the wreckage of a long-lost ship, experts launch an investigation to positively identify the missing vessel and uncover how it could be more than 10 miles from where it reportedly sank.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Monster in the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts are hot on the trail of the legendary sea monster that's reported to live in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and witness testimony, they dive into these chambers to hunt for the deadly beast.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: US Navy vs. the Triangle
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally explain the truth behind one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances, when 306 US Navy crewmen vanished in the Triangle without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Witchcraft in the Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A new lead might finally solve the mystery of the Witchcraft, one of the strangest disappearances on record in the Bermuda Triangle. A cutting-edge expedition leads experts to a shocking discovery on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: Timothy Bass had gotten away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. For years, Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: To Infinity and Back
programme.desc: When Claire Throssell meets Darren Sykes, she thinks her future husband's overwhelming displays of affection are signs of love. She fails to see that Darren is out to control her, and if he doesn't get his way, the revenge he takes will be terrible.

programme.title: Deadly Women: To Have And To Harm
programme.desc: Stories of depraved women who don't allow sacred marriage vows to get in the way of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Disappeared: Just Out of Sight
programme.desc: When Michael VanZandt, a veteran and father of three, disappears one night in Hermosa Beach, Ca., police suspect a group of strangers may be involved. But his loved ones are haunted by suspicions about his thrill seeking when considering his fate.

programme.title: Deadly Women: To Have And To Harm
programme.desc: Stories of depraved women who don't allow sacred marriage vows to get in the way of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Disappeared: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: A date night in Philadelphia becomes deeply disturbing when a couple disappears. Their families unite to find them, but as desperation grows, finger pointing puts them at odds. Soon, the FBI takes over the investigation that is riddled with speculation.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Red River
programme.desc: After Allison Walker mysteriously goes missing just days before Christmas, investigators scour her pig farm in Adairville, Kentucky in search of clues. They quickly discover that the deep, dark secret to her whereabouts lies within her own family.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Madness on the Lake
programme.desc: The remote lakeside town of Bayview, Idaho is a little too quiet for local resident Larry Cragun, and soon the isolation gets to him.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Mystery in the Swamp
programme.desc: The morning of his anniversary, Mike Williams goes duck hunting. When he fails to return home that afternoon, an all-out search commences. But it's only the beginning of a sordid mystery that will take close to 20 years to solve.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge will lead the FBI, US Marshals and Chicago PD on an investigation of epic proportions. But when law enforcement finds the end of the trail, they learn the death count may climb higher.

programme.title: Disappeared: Against the Tide
programme.desc: Twenty-five year-old artist Tiffany Daniels never makes it home from work. When her car is found abandoned in a Pensacola Beach parking lot, it sets off a desperate search for the missing young woman...and dark speculation about her disappearance.

programme.title: Disappeared: American Gothic
programme.desc: When a bible teaching mom goes missing from her family's farm, Missouri investigators must decipher a cryptic handwritten note. They wonder if Lynn Messer was a troubled soul or the victim of foul play. A walk in the woods uncovers a mysterious skull.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Who Pulled the Trigger?
programme.desc: They are the victims of shootings that seem senseless, but there is no motive or suspects.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Drowning in Despair
programme.desc: The accidental drowning of their two children strains Lonnie and Betty Jo Fowler's marriage to the breaking point. But after reconciling and moving closer to family, a sister-in-law's suspicions turn violent.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Peter Chadwick: Caught
programme.desc: A '48 Hours' report helps trip up a wanted fugitive who spent more than four and a half years on the run for allegedly killing his wife and staged a kidnapping scheme.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: There's No Winning in Murder
programme.desc: Corrinna Martin learns that her daughter Alyssiah is missing. After a state-wide search, a discovery confirms Corrinna's worst fears, opening a murder investigation. As a pattern of abuse against Alyssiah is uncovered, tragedy devastates the family again.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: When Ashley Benson is found murdered in a trendy Portland hotel, detectives quickly dial in on three suspects, all of whom have been romantically linked to Ashley while Ashley's parents must come to grips with their daughter's secret life.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Bedtime Murder
programme.desc: Libbi Baume is found violently stabbed to death in her own bedroom. Libbi was a kind hearted pre-school teacher, well-liked in the community so people find it shocking to think she would know anyone who would want to kill her.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Lethal Secrets
programme.desc: High school student Shauna Marie Card is found viciously stabbed to death in a violent, angry attack in her own home. The only clue is a secret diary that leads investigators on a roundabout path to a killer hiding very close by.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Death of Hitler
programme.desc: History tells us that Adolf Hitler committed suicide in his bunker in Berlin. However, some dissenting voices disagree.

programme.title: America's Secret Prisons
programme.desc: A secret part of American history has remained hidden, locked away for centuries in the hulls of ships in New York Harbor or in the depths of an abandoned copper mine, these are America's prisons.

programme.title: America's Zombie Army
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, the United States of America searches for a way to create a generation of super soldiers who use telepathy to win battles. In the 1950s, gangster Whitey Bulger volunteers for the CIA's LSD project known as MK-Ultra.

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities, underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time. They have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: America's Code Breakers
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. But with uncrackable encryption available for your cell phone and computer, have U.S. code warriors finally met their match?

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Guts and Glory
programme.desc: In a nation forged by guts and glory, it takes true cojones to stand out from the crowd. Legendary figures Benjamin Franklin, Al Capone, Abraham Lincoln and Ernest Hemingway have earned their seat at the tough guy table for their no nonsense attitudes.

programme.desc: In pre-war America street gangs were on the rise. California media stirred up panic about young Mexicans and Latinos. When WWII began, racial tensions increased and they were quickly portrayed as a significant threat, leading to a racial boiling point.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
