programme.desc: Eclectic friends, Eddie and Rodney go up against Brandon and Sam, a couple who isn't afraid to get their hands dirty to find a bargain.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Happy Flipping Anniversary!
programme.desc: Hipster pals, Jonathan and Elise take on experienced Upcyclers, husband and wife, John and Sarah.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Team USA vs. Team Canada: Bring Your Eh Game
programme.desc: Canadian craftsmen, Austin and Moh are bringing their 'eh' game against style-savvy American couple Lauren and Scott.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Mus-Stache for Cash
programme.desc: Experienced flippers, Brenda and Mark are ready to take on designing sweethearts, Lauren and Ben.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Peace, Love, and Flipping
programme.desc: Flipping friends, Bridget and Eileen duke it out with peace-loving couple, Fred and Denise. Ready with $500 each, and just one hour to shop, the teams make their way through the aisles of Elephant's Trunk Flea Market in New Milford, Connecticut.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Flipping Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashionable upcyclers, Jenn and Julissa, face off against drinking buddies, TomTom and Gina.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Super Flippers!
programme.desc: Designing friends, Dani and Mo (aka the Wonder Twins), put their heroic flipping powers to the test against the Dynamic Duo of James and Delilah.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Family Flippers
programme.desc: Family pride is on the line when mother/ daughter flippers Leigh and Katey go toe-to-toe against father/ son duo Max and Chris.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Surfside Revive in Texas
programme.desc: A growing family finds a seaside fixer upper in Surfside Beach, Texas.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Tough Times in Topsail
programme.desc: A beach-loving couple looks for a forever home in Topsail, North Carolina, and finds a property with potential that needs major renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Paradise in Pawleys Island
programme.desc: While vacationing in Pawleys Island, SC, a couple fell in love with its friendly, laid-back beach vibe and now is on the hunt for a getaway space of their own.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Memphis
programme.desc: From sweet deals on steak dinners at The Butchershop, to the guilty pleasure of indulgent surf and turf at Iris, Memphis is home to some of the best food you'll ever eat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: It's burger time, and your favourite food personalities are pointing you in the right direction.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Central New York
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights the local favorites in central New York, finding beef and veal sausages at one of America's oldest hot dog stands, half-moon cookies that predate New York City's iconic black and white cookie and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Frankfurt
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Frankfurt where he samples everything from the classic frankfurter and apple wine to pork shoulder with sauerkraut and hand cheese with music.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern returns to the European epicenter of fashion, art and commerce. Paris is home to rich and masterful cuisine, and Andrew finds the best places to get everything from traditional pot au feu topped with with bone marrow to fresh steak tartare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Andrew explores Santa Fe, NM, a town intent on preserving its culture. Native American, Spanish and Mexican traditions converge to form mouthwatering dishes like slow-roasted carne adovada and light-as-air sopapillas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Northern California
programme.desc: Andrew visits Northern California where people are re-inventing they way they look at food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Other Florida
programme.desc: Get away from Florida's big cities and beaches to delve into the interior part of the state where the people and the food have an identity all of their own.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Natural Born Grillers
programme.desc: Three chefs are fired up and enter the Fire Masters Arena ready to compete. In the Crossfire Round, it’s time to shut out the competition when the barrel reveals succulent seafood to choose from.

programme.desc: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot.

programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: DuckTales: Daytrip of Doom!
programme.desc: The nephews take Webby to Funso's Fun Zone and have a dangerous run-in with the Beagle Boys. Donald rebels against Mrs. Beakley's strict "house rules."

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Clean... to the Extreme/ Stand and Delivery
programme.desc: Kick accidentally breaks Gunther's dad's foosball table and must complete a series of favours to replace it before Gunther's dad gets home. Kick takes over the delivery services at Battlesnax and must defend delivery guarantee.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Switching Gears/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Kick's bike is badly damaged hours before the annual BMX Rodeo. The competition gets fierce when Kick decides to ride the Mustang Menace, a supposedly untameable bike. Brad forms a band and takes over the garage, so Kick decides to form his own band.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kickin' Genes/ Clothes Call
programme.desc: When Kick finds out that his mom used to race speedboats, he asks for her help with an upcoming stunt. Kick promises to behave when his Mom drags him on an embarrassing shopping trip to the mall.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Pool Daze/ Live-In Wade
programme.desc: Kick leads his friends in a battle for freedom and fun when the lifeguards at the community pool force them to stay in the kiddie pool.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Sold!/ Faceplant
programme.desc: Kick Buttowski is an extraordinary kid living in the world's most ordinary town.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Stumped Again/ The Kick Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Kick must choose between helping his idol Billy Stumps in a monster truck show and helping his best friend Gunther with an important Viking coming-of-age ritual. Kick teams up with Jackie to take a photo for a billboard contest.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Hand in Hand/ Luigi Vendetta
programme.desc: Kick and Kendall accidentally get their hands stuck together by a rare cave sap and must get un-stuck without being seen. Sick of Brad's bullying, Kick hires someone to 'take care of' Brad.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kick or Treat/ Dead Man's Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Kick vows to trick-or-treat at every house in Mellowbrook, including Mary Van Der Death's creepy mansion. Then, Kick and Gunther find and abandoned amusement park deep in the woods and discover that it may be haunted by Dead Man Dave.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: The Great Revolution! Legend Festival!
programme.desc: It’s time to get hyped! With the curtains finally open on the Legend Festival, Blading legends and challengers alike are gathered for the ultimate showdown. The first stage: battle royale!

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Interview With a Platypus/ Tip of the Day
programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Day of the Living Gelatin!/ Elementary, My Dear Stacy
programme.desc: Pool filled with bouncy gelatin and it comes to life; later family takes trip to England.

programme.desc: After finding out about a spacecraft that has newly been discovered on the moon, the Autobots and Decepticons race against each other to uncover the secrets this strange and mysterious spaceship might hold.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Special Tug

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Love Isn't Blind, It's Retarded
programme.desc: Charlie plans a romantic date with Mia in the hopes of finally consummating their relationship. Meanwhile, Alan starts dating Kandi, Charlie's most recent ex-girlfriend, who is half his age.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Tongue Is Meat
programme.desc: Charlie can't keep pace with the healthy lifestyle that Mia has introduced to their relationship, so he sneaks cigars and beers in the garage. When Mia busts him for lying, Charlie has to figure out if he's just whipped or truly in love.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Unfortunate Little Schnauser
programme.desc: Charlie boycotts an advertising awards banquet, having lost several years in a row to his cocky arch nemesis Archie. After devising a ploy to get him to attend, Alan, Evelyn and Jake accompany Charlie for support, until they get to know Archie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Spit-Covered Cobbler

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Dorothy accepts Lucas's marriage proposal and they wed. Blanche, Rose, and Dorothy say a tearful goodbye with Dorothy planning on moving to Atlanta. Meanwhile, Sophia makes a final decision on where she wants to live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Engagement
programme.desc: Blanche announces that Harry has proposed leaving Rose worried about where she will live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?
programme.desc: Dorothy invites her ex-husband Stan to their daughter's wedding so she can get revenge.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose the Prude
programme.desc: Rose has qualms about sharing her stateroom on an upcoming cruise with a man she likes.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Transplant
programme.desc: Blanche has to make a life-altering decision when the sister she hates needs a kidney.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle

programme.title: The Golden Girls: On Golden Girls

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack

programme.title: Movie: My Father's Other Family
programme.desc: After a family tree DNA test reveals that her deceased father lived a double life, a woman meets the half-sister she never knew she had.

programme.title: Movie: Her Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: A year after Dakota was rescued from a grim, terrifying basement, where she was kidnapped and abused by a monstrous man, she tries to move on with her life. However she realizes someone is stalking her with reminders of her past.

programme.title: Movie: My Husband's Killer Girlfriend
programme.desc: A mother discovers that the nanny who framed her for abandoning her 3-year-old daughter is her ex-husband's new girlfriend, but no one believes her version of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Obsession
programme.desc: The murder of teacher’s aide leaves a hole in the heart of her small community. As rumors spread about suspects, the actual perp slipped further away. Investigators and a scientific breakthrough lead to a shocking end of the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ink Beads
programme.desc: Father and teacher are found hanging naked from a tree with the words 'F E D' on his chest. With barely any evidence to work with, investigators turn to these letters for answers, leading to a surprising conclusion that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Firestarter: A Wall of Flames Part 1
programme.desc: A string of horrifying fires plagues California in the Eighties and Nineties, one of them fatally trapping four people inside. Are these raging infernos accidental or is someone setting them deliberately?

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Firestarter: Chasing a Pyromaniac Part 2
programme.desc: In a race against time, investigators hunt for an arsonist setting devastating fires across California. To their complete shock, the man responsible turns out to be none other than renowned fire investigator Captain John Orr.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Mega Jaws of Bird Island
programme.desc: South African great whites are on the brink of extinction, but experts believe there is at least one breeder shark left in the water surrounding Bird Island. A team will search and tag the last female great white mature enough to carry on the species.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Lost Shark
programme.desc: Forrest Galante heads to the Maldives to find a supposedly extinct shark. Unidentified sharks in the area have led many to believe it's alive. He will dive into an untamed wilderness to answer once and for all is the Pondicherry extinct or alive.

programme.title: Air Jaws: Going for Gold: Sharkmania
programme.desc: The Air Jaws team returns to Seal Rock to capture the highest breach ever.

programme.title: Ninja Sharks 2: Mutants Rising
programme.desc: In the icy waters of Alaska, off populated beaches of New York and lurking in ghostly shipwrecks off the coast of North Carolina, scientists have discovered three sharks that have developed unique and deadly ninja skills.

programme.title: Monster Sharks of Andros Island
programme.desc: Shark researchers travel to Andros Island in The Bahamas to determine if it's a new great hammerhead hotspot, and they're using reports of a half-octopus, half-shark creature known as the Lusca to help them locate massive sharks for their study.

programme.title: Mystery of the Black Demon Shark
programme.desc: Legends swirl around El Demonio Negro, a 50-foot shark in Mexico that has terrorized fishermen and tourists for generations. Is this an undiscovered predator? Forrest Galante hunts for answers in the most rugged and remote parts of the Baja Peninsula.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Best of Sharks: Terrors From the Deep 2
programme.desc: Two adventure seekers recount their horrifying shark attack experiences.

programme.title: Shark Trip: Eat Prey Chum
programme.desc: Explorer Rob Riggle brings his friends Adam DeVine, Anthony Anderson, Joel McHale, and Damon Wayans Jr. on a getaway that's actually a shark diving mission to locate the Caribbean's largest tiger shark.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Shark Week 2
programme.desc: A bull shark turns a spearfishing expedition off the coast of Australia a nightmare, and a paddle boarder on Ascension Island who is attacked by a great white.

programme.title: Capsized: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Based on a true story, in October 1982, a yacht bound for Florida capsizes during an unexpected storm leaving the crew to drift for days in the cold shark-infested waters. They must do everything in their power to survive as the sharks hunt them.

programme.title: Tyson Vs. Jaws: Rumble on the Reef
programme.desc: Mike Tyson learns how to TKO a shark in the name of research as he goes up against sharks.

programme.title: Ronda Rousey Uncaged
programme.desc: Olympian and UFC hall of famer Ronda Rousey gets help from Paul De Gelder to train through three rounds of survival training against three heavyweight opponents the bull sharks, to build to a 'main event' swimming uncaged with mako sharks.

programme.title: Shaq Does Shark Week
programme.desc: To overcome his fear of sharks, Shaq trains with ex-Navy/ Marine comedian Rob Riggle.

programme.title: ShaqAttack
programme.desc: Shaq and his friends Dude Perfect and Mark Rober investigate which shark has the perfect predatory attack.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper Pops Shark Week
programme.desc: Dr. Pimple Popper has entertained millions with her extreme pimple popping videos. Now she heads to Turks and Caicos with Dr. Austin Gallagher to explore the world of shark skin and how she can apply the science they gather to help human skin issues.

programme.title: The Real Sharknado
programme.desc: We have all seen the movies, sharks jumping into boats, circling in tornados and risking their lives to attack humans. Ian Ziering and Tara Reid pick up their chainsaws once again to see if a real Sharknado could happen.

programme.title: Sharkadelic Summer
programme.desc: Snoop Dogg takes a look at crazy encounters and talks with experts on why great whites are living along America's shores.

programme.title: Sharkadelic Summer 2
programme.desc: Sharkadelic is back to find out if this summer will be the sharkiest on record. Snoop Dogg breaks down the craziest encounters, the wildest and most unpredictable reactions to discover if America is once again ground zero for the shark superstorm.

programme.title: Botched: Massive Medical Mystery
programme.desc: A former pro surfer hopes to solve the mystery surrounding two huge masses on his abdomen, while a perfectionist nicknamed 'Nose Ho' won’t settle for anything less than her ideal nose and a bodybuilder must fix her rippling 1200cc implants.

programme.title: Botched: Big Booty Stress and a Mastectomy Mess
programme.desc: A high-risk cancer patient was left with a mastectomy mess and fears her original surgeon didn’t remove all her breast tissue. A 'snow bunny' influencer whose butt is her money-maker needs it to look perfectly bootylicious.

programme.title: Movie: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: A couple sets out to make life difficult for each other after a wild time in Vegas.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Planner
programme.desc: A workaholic wedding planner falls for the engaged doctor whose wedding she is organizing.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Scratch Made Classics
programme.desc: This trip, some of Guy's favourites are totally homemade from coast to coast. In Manhattan, N.Y., a real deal chef is crankin' out homemade pretzels with a special beer cheese sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Passin' the Baton
programme.desc: Guy's hitting' the road and chowin' down on some long standing traditions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast Comfort
programme.desc: Guy is making stops up and down the east coast for some home cooking. He checks out a Southern comfort join in Cambridge, Mass., pierogi in Fall River, and meatballs and fries in Providence.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Authentic Eats
programme.desc: Guy finds real deal authentic eats in St. Louis and Syracuse.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Lover's Paradise
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's signing up for a meat-crazed master class. In Portland, Ore., the craft-cooking family joint with a chef who butchers, cures, preserves and smokes everything in-house.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seriously Saucy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is topping off some great dishes with all kinds of sauce. In Cincinnati, a cafe puts its own spin on barbecue chicken and vegan chilli.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bird and Beef
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, an amped up deli serves up lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Standout Seafood
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in all kinds of standout seafood! There's a restaurant-market in Vancouver that's combining sustainability with killer cooking including their bouillabaisse and salmon fish and chips.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pig's Feet, Mojo and Chow-Chow
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into not-your-everyday recipes, starting in Palm Beach, FL, where a hidden gem is serving up seafood and chow-chow. Plus, a funky Filipino joint in Hawaii is firing up their spin on pig's feet.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sicilian and Seafood
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from incredible Italian to sensational seafood. In Oklahoma City, a funky food truck putting out wood-fired pizza and grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Bowlful of Soul

programme.desc: Ina has all the tricks for cooking French at home with secrets to a show.

programme.desc: Easy meals to prep and pack make any picnic perfect. Jeff Mauro creates a crowd-pleasing sandwich, his Sausage Muffuletta. Katie Lee gives a lesson on making quick pickles.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Italian Feast on Fire
programme.desc: Michael Symon creates an entire Italian feast over coals on the grill, starting with fettuccine with smoked tomato sauce. His wife, Liz, mixes up creamy ricotta, lemon and herbs for stuffed squash blossoms, and they finish with lemon upside-down cake.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Steak Out
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off the summer grilling season with his fire pit steak and potatoes, finishing the steak by throwing it right onto the hot coals!.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: From the Freezer
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is turning everyday frozen ingredients into delicious dishes, including Creamy Shrimp Gnocchi and fabulous All Vegetable Fried Rice. Plus, tots are turned into a Tot Waffle Breakfast Stack.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Where's the Meat?
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is headed to the lodge to make a fabulous meat-free Tex Mex frittata, and she's sharing other epic meat-free meals, too.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Picnic Palooza
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts serve up packable eats for the beach, park, pool or a hike. They make picnic fried chicken with honey giardiniera butter, curried chickpea salad pitas and chilled melon, cucumber and mint salad, and they share tips for outdoor feasting.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Breakfast on the Grill
programme.desc: Michael Symon shows how easy it is as he creates his decadent eggs in heaven, with perfectly cooked eggs in a creamy cheese sauce. He adds some savory herb and parmesan rolls, and his wife, Liz, stirs up her tasty BBC cocktails.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Dinosaur Cake
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman embark on the ultimate journey back in time to create the most realistic dinosaur cakes ever made as centerpieces for a fun-filled sleepover at the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Medieval Times Cake
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman conjure up cakes filled with special effects to celebrate the fantasy and fun of Medieval Times' 30th anniversary. Sword fighting, jousts and royal pageantry inspire them to make two of their most ambitious cakes yet.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Waitress the Musical Cake
programme.desc: Singer and actress Jordin Sparks is finishing her run as the lead in the Tony-nominated Broadway musical Waitress. She asks Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman to help her celebrate by making painstakingly detailed cakes for a huge wrap party.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Aquarium Cake
programme.desc: The competition jumps to the West Coast, where the Aquarium of the Pacific is celebrating a special anniversary. TV star and aquarium icon Isabella Gomez challenges Buddy and Duff to create cakes of an underwater world.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Mini-Golf Cake
programme.desc: It may be called miniature golf, but there's nothing small about Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman's cakes, created as playable holes for a putt-putt event hosted by LPGA tour professional golfer Michelle Wie.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Small House Save
programme.desc: A divorcee dials Leslie and Lyndsay to assist in selling his small home with some big obstacles. The sisters face the challenge by giving functionality to every space and mixing boho style with a bit of Southwest flair to pull in younger buyers.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Nest Egg Reno
programme.desc: A daughter begs Leslie and Lyndsay to take over her mother's rambler after it sat on the market for three months. Using a few of their tricks, the twins change its dated and choppy layout by opening up the home and giving it a calming, coastal vibe.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Day Care Redo
programme.desc: A woman that operates a day care out of her house is having trouble selling since buyers can't visualize her business as a family home. Lyndsay and Leslie transition the commercial space back into a cozy residence with a vintage farmhouse style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Nineties to Now
programme.desc: After sitting on the market for months, a couple's dated tract home urgently needs Lyndsay and Leslie's help. Competing with new builds in the area, they update the home with a high-end cabin look and new feel that brings in offers WAY over asking price.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rental Reno
programme.desc: Selling their rental home is the only thing preventing a couple from starting their daughters' college fund, but it's in rough shape. Leslie and Lyndsay take a stab at transforming the worn-out house into a sophisticated showplace for first-time buyers.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Renewed Ocean Views
programme.desc: A woman is overwhelmed with trying to sell her mom's underwhelming condo. Lyndsay and Leslie step in to reinvent condo living by remodeling the space for mature buyers with a modern Mediterranean design that showcases its stunning ocean view.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Bold Kitchen for a Brit
programme.desc: A British ex-pat and his wife decide to renovate their outdated kitchen. Christina designs a modern-Craftsman look for the space, but getting all of the elements to match becomes a huge challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis
programme.desc: Adam visits St. Louis to chow down on Monte Cristo hot dogs and a platter of barbeque's greatest hits, then attempts to wash'em all down with nearly a gallon of the best milkshakes in town.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose
programme.desc: Adam has 12 minutes to eat 12 wings drenched in habanero sauce. Once he finishes, he must survive 5 minutes without any beverage or condiment to kill the heat.

programme.title: Man v. Food: North Carolina
programme.desc: Adam visits the North Carolina Triangle and chows down on chicken biscuit sandwiches, a whole-hog barbecue, and tackles a hot dog eating challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sarasota

programme.title: Man v. Food: Honolulu

programme.title: Man v. Food: Springfield

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Unnatural World
programme.desc: From a Nebraska road where a farmer hung his entire family to an Upstate New York farmhouse where a demon has long overstayed its welcome, we explore locations linked to unnerving and terrifying tales.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Devil's Playground
programme.desc: From a Nevada motel centered around clowns and haunted by a 1911 tragedy to a Maine movie theater where the horror lurks in the aisles and not on the screen, we explore scary attractions across the nation.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Road Trips
programme.desc: From a Mississippi bridge where a murderer was hanged for his crimes to Savannah's oldest operating hotel built prior to the Civil War, these terrifying roads and haunted roadside spots will make any driver want to lock the doors and roll up the windows.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Coyote Showdown

programme.title: Mountain Men: River Disaster
programme.desc: Kidd and Harry bring down an enormous bull bison, while Eustace races to provide his neighbors with heat. Marth and Eli battle the terrain as they transport their moose harvest.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Brothers
programme.desc: 1894 S Barber Dime, a John Belushi autograph, a 1950s Jim Henson puppet pops in, and a 1965 Schwinn bicycle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lock, Stock, and Pawn
programme.desc: An all-star Dodger's baseball memorabilia bench, a 19th century Hobbs & Co. lock box, an original Woody Woodpecker oil painting, and a set of educational books called the Delphian Course.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Buddy, Can You Spare a Thousand?
programme.desc: Rick might pay 10 times the face value of a rare $1,000 star note. He later pursues the purchase of a World War II Navy gun scope. Chumlee investigates the mysterious legacy of an ancient bronze statue. Rick and Corey check out an iconic storyboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning Reagan
programme.desc: A rare double lock musket finds its way to the shop. An autographed photo of Laurel and Hardy is offered to Rick. A foam Ronald Reagan head has Corey intrigued.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Frontier Fortune
programme.desc: Strum along with the Pawn Stars when a Gibson lap steel guitar jams into the shop. Next, a letter from pioneer Ezra Meeker and a set of commemorative Oregon Trail coins trek on in. Then, a Victorian snuff box shows up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Blades of Deal
programme.desc: A 1984 Ferrari 308 is a find Rick can't wait to drive away with, provided he can make a deal. Corey examines a phone-operated music player that dates back to the 1930s. A cowboy hat formerly owned by Larry Hagman ('Dallas') has Rick excited.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Off the Grid
programme.desc: Rick explores a Funko Pop! Mystery Box, while Corey and Chumlee enlist Rick Dale to rescue their fire alarm system. Then, the Pawn Stars get on their motorcycles to ride to Oregon to spruce up Rick's ranch with some new equipment.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn V. Ferrari
programme.desc: Corey and Chum visit a classic car showroom to see a series 1 Shelby. Later, Chum gets his hands on an autographed Olympic snowboard, and a military vet brings in WWII binoculars.

programme.desc: An in depth look at the life and crimes of master manipulator, and monster, Drew Peterson. Peterson is currently serving time for the murder of his third wife while the search for his fourth wife Stacy continues.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Scott Peterson
programme.desc: When 8 months pregnant Laci Peterson went missing on Christmas Eve 2002, her disappearance became a shocking national story. Scott, convicted of her murder 15 years ago, now has grounds for an appeal.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Face Of Evil
programme.desc: The fire department responds to an apartment fire. Inside they find the body of 21-year-old Carolyn Casey. The investigation into what happened to this bright, young woman leads investigators down a dark path to a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Deed
programme.desc: It was a sprawling southern family farm run by a former church deacon and his wife, who would want the beloved couple dead. Police followed the clues into a family feud, exposing ugly secrets but unmasking the murderer would be more complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Hometown Hero & the Homecoming Queen
programme.desc: Dave Laut won a bronze medal at the 1984 Olympics. California is where Dave grew up, met his wife Jane and lost his life. Jane said it was a prowler but Dave was found dead outside, and a gun was found outside.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Mystery of the Murdered Major
programme.desc: He was a military man, a respected Major in the US Army. When he was attacked in the middle of the night, police launched an investigation that would reveal wild secrets that might hold the key to murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House in the Woods
programme.desc: A hockey player finds his wife murdered in their home. His daughter says she saw a robber, but the killer's identity turns out to be far more complicated. Police had their suspects but her family had questions of their own.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Defranciscos
programme.desc: When a body is found badly burned outside of Chicago, police work tirelessly to track down the killer of this young hardworking truck driver. The search leads them to an unlikely pair of teenage sisters who are able to evade police capture for years.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Youngs
programme.desc: When the patrons of a rural bar are murdered execution-style, two determined detectives work to track down a pair of killer brothers and solve the most heinous crime in the history of the small town.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Polands
programme.desc: Two brothers pull off an elaborate scheme in the desert to rob an armored van of $300,000. When investigators attempt to track down the illusive robbers, the case becomes a homicide once the bodies of the two guards driving the van turn up.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Romero and Self
programme.desc: In the fall of 1992, two brothers terrorize a California community when they embark on a 2-month crime spree that includes three brutal murders and many more near-death attacks. Investigators work to stop the killer siblings before they strike again.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets on the Emerald Coast
programme.desc: A young mother disappears after leaving her infant in the care of a local pastor and his wife. Florida detectives search for five years and uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Dateline: The Confession
programme.desc: A teenager confesses to a double murder and is sentenced to life in prison. When a local businessman hears of the case ten-years later, his investigation leads him to believe the teen was coerced into the confession and wrongfully convicted.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House on the Lake
programme.desc: Stranger than fiction, a mom suddenly vanished. A dad under suspicion. There was no body, no weapon, no eyewitness and surprises along the way. Now, after all the twists and turns of four murder trials, the final verdict is in.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unimaginable
programme.desc: The case made national headlines: A toddler left in the car for seven hours while his dad was at work. Was this a heartbreaking accident? Police said it was murder. Could any parent ever do this on purpose?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Texas Twist
programme.desc: Named for the body of Christ, Corpus Christi sits on the Texas gulf coast. This part of the Lone Star State is largely sheltered from hurricanes. But as it turned out, not from one unnatural disaster.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayed
programme.desc: Melissa Lewis disappeared leaving signs of a struggle and a strange orange mist behind her. Later, her boss went missing and left behind an even bigger mess, including a missing fortune. Two crimes leaving one lingering mystery.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Aileen Wuornos
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the complexities of the case against the woman branded as America’s first female serial killer. Questions still revolve around her claim of self-defense and whether or not she got the justice she deserved.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: The BTK Serial Killer
programme.desc: Self-named killer B.T.K., murdered 10 people over 17 years all while taunting Wichita police and media before being exposed as family man and churchgoer, Dennis Rader. In an exclusively acquired interview, he reveals what drove him to do it.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Bound and Burnt
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds investigate the twisted murder of a new grandmother strangled and set on fire in an abandoned school bus. Things get personal when the primary suspects turn out to be her next door neighbors.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Coal Mine
programme.desc: A rusting industrial complex deep in the woods was once a cornerstone of American business empire, but today, it sits deserted; experts reveal the secrets of this prosperous town's ruin.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Zero Emissions Apart from Water
programme.desc: Futuristic cars may emit water instead of fumes. Tamara Krinsky heads to Los Angeles to investigate the science behind these hydrogen fuel cell powered vehicles, and take one for a test drive.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of Nuclear Secrets
programme.desc: Long, dome-like structures camouflaged by a rural landscape conceal the remains of concrete vaults with a hidden history. Experts investigate and uncover state-of-the-art bunkers built to conceal and protect a deadly nuclear secret.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Russian Mafia Resort
programme.desc: Experts uncover the dark secrets lurking behind a holiday complex built along the Black Sea by the Russian mafia.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Ghost Tower
programme.desc: A breathtaking stainless steel tower seems otherworldly and out of place in the remote mountain forests of Croatia. Experts investigate and uncover a dark past of Nazi-led conflict and a monument to a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Death Fortress
programme.desc: A desert island adrift in the Gulf of Mexico contains a massive and marooned structure with a contagious past. Experts investigate and uncover a desolate military fortress turned prison and plagued by a deadly disease.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hollywood vs. Nazis
programme.desc: A war-torn Italian ghost town immortalized by a legendary Hollywood director blurs the lines between fiction and reality; experts investigate and uncover a forgotten landscape of ruins captured in a WWII documentary.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: When a costly mistake allows a criminal to escape justice, John steps in to help investigators in pursuit of felon Lester Eubanks. And Cal looks into the case of William Stanson, a supposed loving father who turned out to be a sexual predator.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death in her bedroom while her young son sleeps. As Detective Fil Waters digs into the mystery, he soon learns the victim's own mother was murdered twenty-five years earlier.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Great Don Lewis
programme.desc: Donald Lewis is a popular musician who owns a local Jazz Cafe. Despite being beloved in the community, mystery strikes when he suddenly disappears from his jazz club along with his employee. Detectives must find the both of them before it's too late.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder on Red River
programme.desc: More than 15 years after a Texas woman was found dead, floating in a river, a former Marine and a filmmaker think they can find her killer. See if they can solve a cold case that has haunted her Texas town since Mother's Day, 2007.

programme.title: Disappeared in the Darkness: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: When police near Myrtle Beach discover an abandoned car at a boat landing, they surmise its owner, twenty-year-old Heather Elvis, has vanished. They soon discover she's been enmeshed in a love triangle with a married man and led down a path of deceit.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Depths of Depravity
programme.desc: The body of a 20-year-old woman turns up in the most gruesome way imaginable severed and stuffed into trash bags.

programme.title: Disappeared in the Darkness: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: When police near Myrtle Beach discover an abandoned car at a boat landing, they surmise its owner, twenty-year-old Heather Elvis, has vanished. They soon discover she's been enmeshed in a love triangle with a married man and led down a path of deceit.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Innocence Interrupted
programme.desc: The murders of a teenage boy who never returns home from school and a teenage girl who is ambushed as she sits in a car with friends devastate their communities.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Standoff at Trader Joe's
programme.desc: For the first time, some of the hostages reveal the terrifying three hours they spent fearing for their lives while held inside a Los Angeles grocery store that was locked down by a gunman.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Dance with the Devil
programme.desc: A New Jersey woman with a thirst for fun takes the plunge and buys a home close to her family. The wrong houseguest will prove deadly though, as police dig through her life to find an enemy that is hiding very close.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Fatal Impact
programme.desc: A farm foreman is killed in what looks like a deadly accident. The ATF, however, confirms this was no accident it was a bomb with an intended target. Trying to misdirect police, the killer is eventually brought down with the help of a little sunlight.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A History of Violence
programme.desc: In 1979, a walk in the woods turns out to be a deadly mistake for single mom, Marie Huckins. Twenty years later, her daughter Patricia finds a night out following in the same fateful footsteps.

programme.title: Deadly Women: To Have And To Harm
programme.desc: Stories of depraved women who don't allow sacred marriage vows to get in the way of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Suspects at Large
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes, her friend investigates but then disappears herself. Are the men in their social circle responsible? Then, a dancer dies by gunshot, and a lit cigarette could be the clue that targets a killer.

programme.title: Body Cam: Smoking Gun
programme.desc: In Florida, a man is shot dead with a single bullet to the chest. It looks like a murder, but the inquiry takes a surprising turn. In Oklahoma, a high-speed pursuit turns rescue mission as the chase ends in a fiery crash.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda: Fourteen Stories Down
programme.desc: When a promising young realtor plunges to his death from the 14th story of a trendy Miami high-rise, first responders assume suicide. But Det. Joe Shellac suspects foul play and follows a series of clues to the bloodied body of a second victim.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Murder in Cave Creek
programme.desc: Justin Lunsford, convicted of murdering a popular bartender after a night of sex and drugs, insists he's innocent. Now his brother and wife are asking Chris and Fatima to join their fight to free Justin.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: The Meanest Drunk in the South
programme.desc: Former police officer Warren Horinek was a mean drunk, so when his wife, Bonnie, ended up dead from a gunshot wound, he was convicted of her murder. His advocates believe Bonnie committed suicide and hope Chris and Fatima will help to free Horinek.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: It Wasn't Me
programme.desc: In 1992, Roosevelt Myles, a small-time drug dealer, is convicted of murdering a teenage boy on Chicago's West Side. Now, his sister and fiancée have reached out to Chris and Fatima, convinced he is serving time for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Homicide City: Family Tragedy
programme.desc: When 18-month-old Devon Manderach's body is found in a park outside Philly, police suspect the parents; but when her father calls looking for both the toddler and her mom, police quickly learn the case is more horrific and tragic than they imagined.

programme.title: Manson: The Prison Tapes
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate and LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his 'family' of misfit killers.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Banks
programme.desc: Joe Loya is a professional bank robber, addicted to the adrenaline of power. After 13 months of successful robberies, Loya's luck runs out when one robbery goes wrong. It's the latest in bank technology that leads investigators to Loya and ends his spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be a Car Salesman
programme.desc: An ex-con rebuilds his reputation as a successful car salesman until a freak accident threatens to send him back to jail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Copy Movies
programme.desc: A successful video pirate scams the film industry while partying with celebrities and hiding from the law.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Hide Out in Suburbia
programme.desc: Robert Jeffery lost his entire drug business in a fire and robbed a bank to pay off his supplier.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Burn a Truck
programme.desc: Jermaine LeBron and his friends murdered a man in Florida and stole his expensive truck.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Copy Movies
programme.desc: A successful video pirate scams the film industry while partying with celebrities and hiding from the law.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Inside the Killbox: Fighting the Gulf War
programme.desc: Take a serious look at the most significant military conflict of the late 20th century. Go past the politics of the moment and deep into the actual conduct of the campaign, from Iraq's 1990 invasion of Kuwait to the 1991 cessation of hostilities.

programme.title: Inside Special Ops: PMC
programme.desc: Explore private military contractors, revealing how they operate and why the government can no longer wage modern warfare without them.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: The Battle Begins
programme.desc: Master pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman go head-to-head for the first time ever in a competition to determine the world's best baker. In the first of six bake-off challenges, Buddy and Duff must make their most beloved family recipes.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Carnival and Bollywood
programme.desc: Buddy and Duff face off in a battle of carnival treats. They must satisfy a crowd of hungry amusement park patrons. For the cake-off challenge, they must each create a Bollywood-inspired cake for Aatari Sequeira.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: It's a Dog's Life
programme.desc: Buddy and Duff put their skills to the test making pies that are delicious and beautiful enough to wow the judges. Buddy pays homage to his Old World roots, while Duff follows his artistic impulses. They create dog-themed cakes for Christina Anstead.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: Duff Goldman brings Buddy Valastro into his world of fine dining with a challenge to create elegant plated desserts. In the cake-off, they must create a cake for celebrity event planner Slomique Hawrylo's bridal fitting event.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: Donuts and Magic
programme.desc: Kicking things off in the bake-off challenge, pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman have to handle the morning rush at Los Angeles' iconic Randy's Donuts drive-thru. They prepare dozens of deep-fried delights.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: For the finale, pastry chefs Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman head to the Food Network Kitchen to create their most heartfelt and monumental creations yet: chocolate desserts to conceal engagement rings for two surprise proposals.

programme.title: Buddy vs. Duff: It's a Dog's Life
programme.desc: Buddy and Duff put their skills to the test making pies that are delicious and beautiful enough to wow the judges. Buddy pays homage to his Old World roots, while Duff follows his artistic impulses. They create dog-themed cakes for Christina Anstead.

programme.desc: Duff Goldman brings Buddy Valastro into his world of fine dining with a challenge to create elegant plated desserts. In the cake-off, they must create a cake for celebrity event planner Slomique Hawrylo's bridal fitting event.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Brunch
programme.desc: Indulge your weekend cravings at some of the most unique brunch spots from the nation's capitol, to New York, to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Late-Night Eats
programme.desc: A look at some eateries that serve food late into the night, that is worth staying up for.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Cupcakes
programme.desc: We'll take you from coast to coast to taste the most unique cupcakes in the country. Indulge in artisanal cupcakes paired with beer and wine; stuff yourself with custard-filled cupcakes.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Off the Grid
programme.desc: Go off the beaten path and visit eateries that are unknown to tourists. A rustic Italian restaurant in Staten Island, a perfect pizza in Las Vegas and a dining destination in Hawaii.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Vegas
programme.desc: You can eat at some of the most interesting, delicious and unique restaurants in Vegas.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Polynesian Paradise
programme.desc: We're taking a trip to the 50th state for an indulgent culinary weekend.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Chicken
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America in search of the 12 very best chicken dishes. From frying and baking to grilling, Roger is hanging out with chefs as they explore all the best ways to cook wings, pot pies, pizzas and other savory chicken dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Cheesy Dishes
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says 'Cheese' as he explores 15 of the best cheesy dishes across the U.S. The creamiest, smoothest and stringiest French, Italian, Mexican and American cheesy classics and innovations are on display.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireplace Feasts
programme.desc: Roger loves cooking in a fireplace. He visits two places in New England that host fireplace feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heavy Metal Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets blown away by not one but two of the biggest metal-clad rigs he's ever seen. In Algoma, WI, he meets brothers Brad and Aric Schmiling who use a giant cinder block pit and massive metal grates to roast a whole steer.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ in Big Cities
programme.desc: Roger knows it's not just small towns that dish out big flavours. He heads to Bludso's Bar and Que in L.A., where the owner brings meat and hear to Tinseltown in a big way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bowl O' Bayou
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown sheds light on Cajun and Creole, and comes up with a method for making a brick roux and the perfect gumbo.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ginger: Rise of the Rhizome
programme.desc: When a fairy tale figure seeks host Alton Brown's help in spicing up his personality, it leads to the exploration of that zesty rhizome ginger.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bean Stalker
programme.desc: Alton reinvents the classic green bean casserole just in time to save the holidays.

programme.title: Good Eats: Peanut Gallery
programme.desc: Alton Brown turns a handful of peanuts into some seriously delectable treats.

programme.desc: Clyde arranges for an exchange student to stay with them; Lola takes a timid classmate under her wing.

programme.desc: The siblings turn to Lisa's genius to help them land a spot on 'Double Dare.' After secretly reading Luna's diary, Leni and Lincoln become worried about her.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Write Stuff/ Racing Hearts
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-books way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over. When Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods, they discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Star is Scorned/ Senior Moment
programme.desc: When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily. Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time.

programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.desc: Lana wants to win a race car ride-along with her hero, so she and Lincoln enter to compete in a soap box derby.When Luan must enroll in a culinary class, Dad uses it to share his passion for cooking with one of his kids.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.desc: Luna leads a protest to save the high school music club; Lana becomes desperate to play Lincoln's trash-themed video game.

programme.desc: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

programme.desc: Three musically inclined chipmunks, Alvin, Simon and Theodore, meet frustrated songwriter David Seville and impress him with their singing talent.
